repos.name: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
repos.desc: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.

repos.name: addyosmani/agent-skills
repos.desc: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

repos.name: Zackriya-Solutions/meetily
repos.desc: Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows.

repos.name: ruvnet/RuView
repos.desc: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

repos.name: Leonxlnx/taste-skill
repos.desc: Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop

repos.name: alirezarezvani/claude-skills
repos.desc: 345 Claude Code skills & agent skills & plugins (30+ Agents, 70+ custom commands, 330+ skills, customizable references, scripts)for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 8 more coding agents — engineering, marketing, product, compliance, C-level advisory, research, business operations, commercial & finance, and your daily productivity skills.

repos.name: openai/codex-plugin-cc
repos.desc: Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.

repos.name: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
repos.desc: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

repos.name: ogulcancelik/herdr
repos.desc: agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.

repos.name: bradautomates/claude-video
repos.desc: Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.

repos.name: karakeep-app/karakeep
repos.desc: A self-hostable bookmark-everything app (links, notes and images) with AI-based automatic tagging and full text search

repos.name: firecrawl/firecrawl
repos.desc: The API to search, scrape, and interact with the web at scale. 🔥

repos.name: steipete/CodexBar
repos.desc: Show usage stats for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code, without having to login.

repos.name: alibaba/zvec
repos.desc: A lightweight, lightning-fast, in-process vector database

repos.name: sindresorhus/awesome
repos.desc: 😎 Awesome lists about all kinds of interesting topics
